content.text:
I don't just write code, I craft experiences. My goal is to break generic layouts and build responsive interactive webs that feel alive.

Currently focusing on React.ts and Java SpringBoot.

I grew up in China, finished high school inLondon, and now I'm finishing my Bachelor'sin Berlin.

Adapting to different cultures has taught me to adaptable in my code and communication.

My journey began in Year 8 with Unity & C#. I dabbled in Blender to create game assets, which sparked my love for visual coding.

This transitioned into Python application development (Kivy) and facial recognition projects.

My journey began in Year 8 with Unity & C#. I dabbled in Blender to create game assets, which sparked my love for visual coding.

This transitioned into Python application development (Kivy) and facial recognition projects.

I moved from the MERN stack to a strictly typed React.ts frontend.

Backend? I'm diving deep into Java. Next stop: Mobile Application Development.
I am working on many project and work. Nevertheless, I dedicate time for my own projects that I hope to release soon and continue learning more through them
